nodes.label: Keycloak Identity and Access Management System
nodes.norm_label: keycloak identity and access management system

nodes.label: MasterTicket Spatial Clustering Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Deduplicates multiple reports of the same physical road issue (within a 50m radius) into a single MasterTicket, avoiding overwhelming officials with duplicate complaints while tracking community interest via contribution counts and auto-upgrading priority.

nodes.label: Grievance Escalation Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Redesigned for rapid resolution compared to CPGRAMS's slow bureaucratic escalation. Uses real-time status updates via WebSockets, SLA timers, auto-escalation, and blackspot overrides to bypass junior levels for critical accident-prone areas.

nodes.label: Proof-of-Work (PoW) Validation Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Ensures accountability by requiring contractors to upload before/after photos and geotags. Automates verification through a Python AI service checking EXIF data and visual change via LLM vision to prevent false resolutions.

nodes.label: Role-Based Access Control and Row-Level Security
nodes.rationale: Ensures data visibility is automatically scoped to each user's jurisdiction (e.g. Ward Engineer sees Ward 42 tickets; NHAI GM sees corridor). Essential for driving adoption among Indian government officials by mirroring their operational workflows and enabling sandboxed contractor portals.
nodes.norm_label: role-based access control and row-level security

nodes.label: Agentic AI Multilingual Chatbot Interface
nodes.rationale: Provides a highly accessible, conversational, and multilingual entry point for citizens to report issues, track tickets, or query budgets without navigating complex menus.
